summary: Batch 1+2 UX Fixes testing complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified. Fixed Team pages endpoint bug (was using /api/admin/staff which returns 404, changed to /api/supervisor-team/staff-list).
critical_code_review_comments: AdminSettingsHubPage.jsx: Settings Hub uses tighter layout with sidebar 240px, content max-w-[960px], pl-8 padding - VERIFIED
AdminContentCenterPage.jsx: 'Create Branded Post' button navigates to /admin/content-studio - VERIFIED
AdminContentStudioPage.jsx: Preview drawer has 3 action buttons (Download, Save Draft, Publish) - VERIFIED
content_engine_routes.py: POST /api/admin/content-center/publish endpoint accepts base64 image_data - VERIFIED
TeamAlertsPage.jsx: Uses /api/admin/crm/leads to generate overdue follow-up alerts - VERIFIED
adminNavigation.js: Growth & Affiliates section does NOT contain 'Margin & Distribution' - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team pages (Overview, Leaderboard, Alerts) now use /api/supervisor-team/staff-list endpoint. Content Studio publish uses POST /api/admin/content-center/publish with base64 image_data. Growth & Affiliates sidebar has 6 items: Affiliates, Affiliate Payouts, Promotions Manager, Promotions Engine, Content Center, Content Studio.

settings_hub_layout.tab_switching: Works correctly, updates title and content

content_center.content_grid: Shows items with images, format badges, promo codes

content_studio.theme_selectors: Light, Dark Premium, Promotional, Clean Minimal

preview_drawer.creative_preview: Shows branded template with product info
preview_drawer.captions: Short, Social, WhatsApp/Sales, Story - all copyable

team_overview.kpi_cards: Sales Members, Active Leads, Deals Closed, Total Revenue
team_overview.team_table: Shows 4 sales staff members with name, email, stats

leaderboard.ranking_list: Shows 4 sales staff ranked by revenue

alerts.alerts_list: Shows 31 overdue follow-up alerts from CRM leads

sales_content_hub_regression.content_grid: Shows products with images, prices, promo badges

team_pages_endpoint.issue: Team Overview and Leaderboard pages were using /api/admin/staff which returns 404
team_pages_endpoint.fix: Changed to /api/supervisor-team/staff-list which returns staff data
